name: Crunchy Refrigerator Coleslaw
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred the cabbage very thin and combine with julienned green peppers, minced onions, and shredded carrots. Sprinkle sugar over the mixture, stirring well to ensure it is evenly distributed.
2. In a saucepan, combine all dressing ingredients (sugar, celery seed, salt, black pepper, dry mustard, cilantro, parsley, ground basil). Bring to a boil, then remove from heat. Pour the hot dressing over the cabbage mixture and blend thoroughly.
3. Cover tightly and refrigerate for at least 8 hours or overnight. Add jicama just before serving and stir again.
